list.title: DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation

extra.desc: DSpark enhances LLM inference speed by combining parallel draft generation with adaptive verification that reduces waste and improves throughput in high-concurrency settings.

list.title: MuseBench: Benchmarking Intent-Level Audiovisual Arts Understanding in MLLMs

extra.desc: A comprehensive benchmark called Musebench is introduced to evaluate multimodal large language models on nuanced artistic understanding, revealing a significant gap between current models and human expert performance in creative domain expertise.

list.title: Flex-Forcing: Towards a Unified Autoregressive and Bidirectional Video Diffusion Model

extra.desc: Flex-Forcing enables video diffusion models to operate under both bidirectional and autoregressive generation regimes through a flexible chunking mechanism over temporal and denoising steps, improving video quality and inference speed.

list.title: Parallelized Autoregressive Decoding for Omni-Modal Dense Video Captioning

extra.desc: A parallelized autoregressive framework for dense video captioning that improves generation efficiency by exploiting weak local dependencies across temporally distinct events while maintaining temporal grounding accuracy.

list.title: Quantifying and Expanding the Theoretical Capacity of Late-Interaction Retrieval Models

extra.desc: MaxSim similarity can exactly replicate inner products between sparse vectors and supports logical operations, with Signed MaxSim extending this capability to real-valued vectors while improving retrieval performance on complex query types.

list.title: TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine

extra.desc: TREK expands exploration support for policy optimization by using distillation for exploration rather than imitation, improving performance on challenging mathematical reasoning and agentic tasks.

list.title: SIEVE: Structure-Aware Data Selection for Imitation Learning with VLA Models

extra.desc: SIEVE is a structure-aware data selection method for vision-language-action imitation learning that identifies reusable visuo-motor primitives and transition interfaces to improve policy learning efficiency.

list.title: SkillOpt-Lite: Better and Faster Agent Self-evolution via One Line of Vibe

extra.desc: A minimal viable pipeline for skill optimization is proposed through Zeroth-Order optimization formalization, eliminating redundancies while maintaining convergence and generalization through trajectory exploration, consensus mining, and validation gating principles.

list.title: AlayaWorld: Long-Horizon and Playable Video World Generation

extra.desc: AlayaWorld is an open-source framework for creating interactive generative worlds that enables real-time user interaction and supports diverse actions within a modular architecture.

list.title: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion: A Tri-Mode Language Model Unifying Autoregressive, Diffusion, and Self-Speculation Decoding

extra.desc: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion is a tri-mode language model that combines autoregressive, diffusion, and self-speculation decoding to achieve superior throughput and efficiency compared to existing models.

list.title: RynnWorld-Teleop: An Action-Conditioned World Model for Digital Teleoperation

extra.desc: Digital teleoperation replaces physical robot interaction with generative world models to create diverse training data for robotics, enabling efficient zero-shot Sim2Real transfer and improved real-world performance.

list.title: RynnWorld-4D: 4D Embodied World Models for Robotic Manipulation

extra.desc: A multi-modal 4D world model generates synchronized RGB, depth, and optical flow data from single RGB-D images and language instructions, enabling efficient robotic manipulation through unified diffusion processes and inverse dynamics policy learning.

list.title: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory

extra.desc: Light-Omni is a multimodal agent framework that enables efficient video understanding through dual contextual states, achieving faster and more accurate video processing by eliminating iterative reasoning while maintaining semantic alignment.

list.title: GaP: A Graph-as-Policy Multi-Agent Self-Learning Harness For Variational Automation Tasks

extra.desc: Graph-as-Policy system combines modular robot skills with multi-agent coding to improve reliability in variable automation tasks through parallel simulation refinement.

list.title: ACID: Action Consistency via Inverse Dynamics for Planning with World Models

extra.desc: ACID is a decision-time planning framework that enhances action-conditioned world models by enforcing cycle action consistency to improve trajectory realism and reduce computational requirements.

list.title: SeKV: Resolution-Adaptive KV Cache with Hierarchical Semantic Memory for Long-Context LLM Inference

extra.desc: SeKV introduces a resolution-adaptive semantic KV cache that compresses context into entropy-guided spans stored across GPU-CPU memory hierarchies, enabling efficient long-context processing with minimal memory overhead and preserved token-level detail.

list.title: Learning to Trigger: Reinforcement Learning at the Large Hadron Collider

extra.desc: Reinforcement learning agents optimize real-time trigger thresholds at particle colliders by adapting Group-Filtered Policy Optimization to streaming control, improving signal efficiency and background rate management on both simulated and real collision data.

list.title: Look Before You Leap: Distilling Tree Search into Action Evaluation for Frozen VLA Models

extra.desc: A framework called SVA is introduced that enhances Vision-Language-Action models by decoupling action generation from consequence evaluation, thereby improving generalization and task success rates while reducing computational costs.

list.title: Bridging Interleaved Multi-Modal Reasoning as a Unified Decision Process

extra.desc: BRAID framework enables unified multi-modal reasoning by casting text-image interaction as a Markov decision process, allowing joint optimization through reinforcement learning with vision-language model guidance.

list.title: Speaker-Aware Temporal Aggregation Strategies on Segment Representations for Depression Detection in Dyadic Interaction: A Benchmark Study

extra.desc: Temporal aggregation methods for speech-based depression detection show inconsistent performance across different backbones and training runs, highlighting the need for robust benchmarking criteria.

list.title: SynCity 3000: Bootstrapping Scene-Scale 3D Diffusion

extra.desc: SynCity 3000 generates large, coherent 3D scenes by adapting image-to-3D generators as convolutional operators through fine-tuning on synthetic scene data.

list.title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence

extra.desc: A unified audio-text large language model is presented that integrates audio and text processing through a shared transformer decoder, achieving superior performance across multiple audio and speech tasks while maintaining strong text reasoning capabilities.

list.title: Taste-aware music retrieval from audio embeddings

extra.desc: Audio encoders from HEAR families are evaluated for taste prediction, with gated late-fusion showing superior rank correlation and the best models achieving human-level accuracy on held-out music.

list.title: Transition-Aware best-of-N sampling for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Reports

extra.desc: A novel training-free sampling method for chest X-ray report generation that leverages longitudinal patient history by encoding changes between prior and current examinations through set-to-set distance metrics.

list.title: MANCE: Manifold Aware Concept Erasure

list.title: KVpop -- Key-Value Cache Compression with Predictive Online Pruning

list.title: MV-Forcing: Long Multi-View Video Generation via 4D-Grounded Spatio-Temporal Self-Forcing

list.title: Perceptual Flow Matching for Few-Step Generative Modeling
